EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name}@{subject.account.domain} from host {src.host} failed to pass Kerberos authentication on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to pass Kerberos authentication on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}

The Kerberos service on host {event_src.host} failed to issue a session ticket (TGS), which is requested from host {src.host}, for the account {subject.account.name} to access the service {logon_service}. Reason: {reason}

The Kerberos service on host {event_src.host} failed to issue a session ticket (TGS), which is requested from host {src.host}, for the account {subject.account.name}@{subject.account.domain} to access the service {logon_service}. Reason: {reason}
